요한계시록 10:1.content: I saw a mighty angel coming down out of the sky, clothed with a cloud. A rainbow was on his head. His face was like the sun, and his feet like pillars of fire.

요한계시록 10:2.content: He had in his hand a little open book. He set his right foot on the sea, and his left on the land.

요한계시록 10:3.content: He cried with a loud voice, as a lion roars. When he cried, the seven thunders uttered their voices.

요한계시록 10:4.content: When the seven thunders sounded, I was about to write; but I heard a voice from the sky saying, “Seal up the things which the seven thunders said, and don’t write them.”

요한계시록 10:5.content: The angel whom I saw standing on the sea and on the land lifted up his right hand to the sky,

요한계시록 10:6.content: and swore by him who lives forever and ever, who created heaven and the things that are in it, the earth and the things that are in it, and the sea and the things that are in it, that there will no longer be delay,

요한계시록 10:7.content: but in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he is about to sound, then the mystery of God is finished, as he declared to his servants, the prophets.

요한계시록 10:8.content: The voice which I heard from heaven, again speaking with me, said, “Go, take the book which is open in the hand of the angel who stands on the sea and on the land.”

요한계시록 10:9.content: I went to the angel, telling him to give me the little book. He said to me, “Take it, and eat it. It will make your stomach bitter, but in your mouth it will be as sweet as honey.”

요한계시록 10:10.content: I took the little book out of the angel’s hand, and ate it. It was as sweet as honey in my mouth. When I had eaten it, my stomach was made bitter.

요한계시록 10:11.content: They told me, “You must prophesy again over many peoples, nations, languages, and kings.”
